commands.name: setup
commands.description: Initialize one or more LED channels from a name-to-GPIO map.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set one or more named channels using keyword values.

commands.name: set_channel
commands.description: Set one named channel to a brightness value.

commands.name: set_all
commands.description: Set every configured LED channel to one brightness value.

commands.name: set_rgb
commands.description: Set RGB-like channels. Names beginning with red/r, green/g, and blue/b are matched.

commands.name: set_color
commands.description: Set RGB-like channels using a known color name.

commands.name: blink
commands.description: Blink all channels or provided channel values.

commands.name: fade
commands.description: Fade one channel or all channels up and down.

commands.name: self_test
commands.description: Briefly light each configured channel one by one.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Return driver metadata and current configuration.
